home.heroDescription: Industry-leading precision winding solutions for transformers, motors, and electrical components. Engineered for performance, built for reliability.
home.whyChooseUsDesc: With decades of expertise in precision engineering, we deliver winding solutions that exceed industry standards.
home.modernDesignDesc: Precision-engineered machines built with the highest quality precision components for unmatched accuracy and durability.
home.cleanCodeDesc: State-of-the-art CNC control systems and automation for consistent, high-quality coil production.
home.supportDesc: Comprehensive after-sales support, training, and maintenance services to keep your production running smoothly.
home.clientLogosDescription: Companies across the globe rely on ERASAN winding solutions for precision, reliability, and performance.
home.ctaDescription: Contact us today to discuss your winding requirements and discover the perfect machine for your needs.

about.title: ABOUT ERASAN
about.heroDescription:
Specialist manufacturers of winding machines, accessories, and custom solutions for the winding industry.

18 years of experience and the trust of more than 500 manufacturers worldwide back us as a technological partner to bring added value to your company.

At ERASAN, we offer solutions for all types of work with foil, rectangular wire, or round wire, for all types of windings: edge winding, amorphous core, flyer...
about.missionDescription1: Our mission is to provide manufacturers with the most reliable, efficient, and precise coil winding solutions available. Every machine we build represents our commitment to quality and innovation.
about.missionDescription2: From small prototype runs to high-volume production, we engineer solutions that optimize your manufacturing process and deliver consistent results.
about.teamDescription: Our team combines decades of experience in electrical engineering, mechanical design, and manufacturing automation.

services.title: OUR PRODUCTS
services.heroDescription: Explore our comprehensive range of coil winding machines, designed for transformers, motors, solenoids, and specialized applications.
services.webDevDesc: High-precision toroidal winding machines for inductors, current transformers, and power supplies.
services.mobileAppsDesc: Versatile linear winding systems for motor coils, solenoids, and relay components.
services.uiuxDesc: Specialized equipment for power transformers, distribution transformers, and custom windings.
services.backendDesc: Computer-controlled layer winding machines for precision multi-layer coils and bobbin winding.
services.securityDesc: Fully automated winding lines with robotic handling and quality inspection systems.
services.performanceDesc: Comprehensive testing systems for electrical characteristics, insulation, and quality verification.
services.ctaDescription: We design and manufacture custom winding machines tailored to your specific production requirements.

footer.description: Industry-leading coil winding machines and precision engineering solutions for manufacturers worldwide.

slide1.title: Transformer Winding
slide1.description: Precision winding solutions for power transformers, distribution transformers, and specialty applications. Achieve consistent quality with our advanced tensioning systems.

slide2.title: Motor Coil Production
slide2.description: High-speed winding equipment for electric motor stators, rotors, and armatures. Optimized for both AC and DC motor manufacturing.

slide3.title: Inductor Manufacturing
slide3.description: Specialized machines for toroidal inductors, chokes, and filter components. Perfect wire placement for maximum electrical performance.

slide4.title: Custom Engineering
slide4.description: Tailored winding solutions designed to meet your unique production requirements. From concept to installation, we deliver excellence.

legal.description11: This website is purely institutional and informational. It does not include contact forms, registration forms, newsletters, or any other mechanism that directly collects, stores, or processes users' personal data.
legal.description13: As there is no registration or storage of personal data on our servers, no processing is carried out for which the user must exercise rights of access, rectification, erasure, or objection with this company.
legal.description14: To facilitate the physical location of our facilities, this website uses the interactive Google Maps API, provided by the third party Google Ireland Limited (located at Gordon House, Barrow Street, Dublin 4, Ireland).
legal.description16: When loading the page containing the interactive map, your browser establishes a direct connection with Google's servers. legal.description18: The legitimate basis for this processing is our legitimate interest in providing an interactive and visual service for locating the company.

bobinadora-strip-foil.title: Strip Foil Winding Machine
bobinadora-strip-foil.heroSubtitle: Two-paper, one-foil machine for manufacturing coils for large resin-cast/dry-type distribution and power transformers.
bobinadora-strip-foil.excerpt: Two-paper, one-foil machine for manufacturing coils for large resin-cast/dry-type distribution and power transformers.
heroIntro: Winding unit comprising a welded steel head, pneumatic press roller, and expandable mandrel.
The dereeling mandrel is a hydraulic expandable shaft. Lateral foil dereeler movement is controlled by a photocell to correct possible deviations.

gallery.caption: ERASAN STRIP FOIL LATERAL Winding Machine

highlight.title: Multiple configurations available for coils up to 2,300 mm with a 1,800 mm winding zone
highlight.subtitle: Supports winding a wide range of transformer and strip sizes and quantities as required.

benefitCards.title: High-efficiency electromechanical drive
benefitCards.description: Ensuring energy savings and reduced maintenance

benefitCards.title: Equipped with Ethernet connectivity
benefitCards.description: Enables remote technical support from anywhere in the world

benefitCards.title: Latest-generation CNC control system
benefitCards.description: With 7" color touchscreen

benefitCards.title: Visual, operator-friendly program interface
benefitCards.description: Allows creating any coil type and winding action required quickly and without errors

characteristics.title: Features
characteristics.body: The paper dereeler offers easy loading and unloading thanks to its pneumatic shafts. It maintains the constant tension required during winding, while a photocell monitors paper position at all times, shifting laterally when needed. It includes electronic control for fast paper adjustment.

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features STRIP FOIL
items: Surplus paper collection unit via a motorized roller installed next to the foil dereeler system.
Foil cutting system by nibbler or shear.
Welding unit with optional welding table.
Burr eliminator to prevent damage to copper or aluminum strip ends: two sets of two rollers applying pressure on the band edges, one above the other.
Option: TIG welding table.
Option: Guillotine foil cutting.

bobinadora-folio.title: Folio Winding Machine
bobinadora-folio.heroSubtitle: For manufacturing coils for large resin-cast/dry-type distribution and power transformers
bobinadora-folio.excerpt: For manufacturing coils for large resin-cast/dry-type distribution and power transformers
heroIntro: Winding unit comprising a welded steel head, pneumatic press roller, and expandable mandrel.
Mechanical structure: electrowelded steel body, heat-treated for stabilization, machined and milled components. High torsional rigidity with oven-baked paint finish.

highlight.title: Multiple configurations available up to 1,500 mm width
highlight.subtitle: Enables easy primary winding with very short production cycle times.

benefitCards.description: Ensuring energy savings and reduced maintenance

benefitCards.description: Allows creating any coil type and winding action required quickly and without errors

characteristics.title: Features
characteristics.body: ERASAN Technology's modular foil machine concept introduces a novel foil cutting system and constant tension in both paper dereelers and the foil dereeler, making it a precise and safe machine for creating large coils. A braking system acts on both the foil and paper dereelers, maintaining constant tension regardless of the amount of foil.

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features E-FOIL
items: Winding module
Spool holder module
Welding module
Cutting module
Foil dereeler module

highlight.title: Capable of delivering 1,000 Nm at low speed

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features E1200C SGB
items: Two kinematic versions: up to 750 rpm with high torque
Allows manufacturing coils up to 1,100 mm in length
Allows manufacturing high and low voltage coils on the same machine.
Equipped with servomotors in winding head and wire guide
Four speed ranges with lever shifting
Allows easy adaptation to winding needs in terms of torque and speed.

dispensador-de-papel-dp1-p.title: DP1-P Paper Dispenser
features: Compatible with a wide variety of insulation formats. In addition to paper, it can be used with different types of liners, tapes, and fabrics.
"The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"
Compatible with a wide variety of insulation formats

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features DP1-P
items: Paper tensioner with electromagnetic brake and expandable shaft.
Allows integrated mounting on the machine or separate placement according to customer requirements.
Brake adjustment via software (when the tensioner is integrated into the machine) or via potentiometer.
Equipped with two adjustable roller sets to guide the paper.

dispensador-de-papel-tpe.title: TPE Paper Dispenser
dispensador-de-papel-tpe.excerpt: Maximum paper spool of 400 mm and 310 mm in length

Brake adjustment via software (when the tensioner is integrated into the machine) or via potentiometer.
Equipped with two adjustable roller sets to guide the paper.

devanador-dp1r-ap1r.title: DP1R AP1R Dereeler
devanador-dp1r-ap1r.excerpt: Dual brake for better constant tension
features: The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way. They can hold from a single spool up to 32.
"The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"
The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way.

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features DP1R AP1R
items: The main difference of DP1R is the dual brake provided, which improves tension and, together with AP1R, helps maintain constant tension.
If the spool wire exceeds the limit, AP1R removes slack by increasing tension through a downward-moving pulley.
The spool has a pneumatically controlled hydraulic disc brake system, and the control box includes a pressure gauge and wire tension cut-off switch that allows the wire to rotate freely.
Available on request with electromagnetic brake.

devanador-dp4.title: DP4 Dereeler
devanador-dp4.excerpt: DP4 dereeler. Allows mounting 4 spools with a maximum diameter of 750 mm and wire diameter of 99 mm. Provides constant wire tension during winding.
features: The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way. They can hold from a single spool up to 32.
"The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"
The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way.

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features DP4
items: Provides constant wire tension during winding
The spool has a pneumatically controlled hydraulic disc brake system, and the control box includes a pressure gauge and wire tension cut-off switch that allows the wire to rotate freely.
The DP4 is placed behind the machine to facilitate wire guidance from the spool to the machine. The control box can be positioned wherever convenient, such as on the winding machine.
Available on request with electromagnetic brake.

devanador-dp2.title: DP2 Dereeler
devanador-dp2.excerpt: DP2 dereeler. Allows mounting 2 spools with a maximum diameter of 750 mm and wire diameter of 99 mm. Provides constant wire tension during winding.
features: The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way. They can hold from a single spool up to 32.
"The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"
The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way.

items: Provides constant wire tension during winding

The DP2 is placed behind the machine to facilitate wire guidance from the spool to the machine. The control box can be positioned wherever convenient, such as on the winding machine.
Available on request with electromagnetic brake.

features: The DP wire and strip tensioner range is designed in a modular way. They can hold from a single spool up to 32.

mandril-expandible-rectangular.title: Rectangular Expandable Mandrel
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN expandable mandrel features rectangular
items: The expandable mandrel is finished with aluminum bars and built with very precise mechanics to support the weight of the finished coil, using mechanical cams and support rings.
Each mandrel has a standard key hole for expansion.
Iron cores or laminations can be inserted later in the coil manufacturing process.

mandril-expandible-circular.title: Round Expandable Mandrel
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN expandable mandrel features circular
items: The expandable mandrel is finished with aluminum bars and built with very precise mechanics to support the weight of the finished coil, using mechanical cams and support rings.
Each mandrel has a standard key hole for expansion.
Iron cores or laminations can be inserted later in the coil manufacturing process.

guiador-de-pletina-gp2.title: GP2 Strip Guide
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN GP2 Strip Guide Features
items: Guide for rectangular sections using pulleys that can be adjusted to the section used.
This guide type is extremely robust because it is typically used with multiple strips and high tension.
Guide for rectangular sections using rollers that can be adjusted to the section used. Includes a tape dereeler guide.
This guide type is used to wind multiple strips and tape the final layer under high tension.

guiador-de-pletina-gp1.title: GP1 Strip Guide
guiador-de-pletina-gp1.excerpt: Strip guide. Tensions up to 2 kg per mm of section.
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN GP1 Strip Guide Features
items: Guide for rectangular sections using pulleys that can be adjusted to the section used.
This guide type is extremely robust because the tensions used with these conductors are very high.
Guide for rectangular sections using rollers that can be adjusted to the section used. Includes a tape dereeler guide.
This guide type is used to wind multiple strips and tape the final layer under high tension.

guiador-de-hilo-gh3.title: GH3 Wire Guide
guiador-de-hilo-gh3.excerpt: Wire guide for wire up to 8.00 mm in diameter.
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN GH3 Wire Guide Features
items: Wire guide through a small wire guide tube
Wire guide using pulleys that allows working with wire up to 8 mm in diameter.
Its angle is usually 45°.

guiador-de-hilo-gh2.title: GH2 Wire Guide
guiador-de-hilo-gh2.excerpt: Wire guide for wire up to 3.00 mm in diameter.
features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN GH2 Wire Guide Features
items: Wire guide through a small wire guide tube
Wire guide using pulleys that allows working with wire up to 3 mm in diameter.

guiador-de-hilo-gh1.title: GH1 Wire Guide

features: "The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance"

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN GH1 Wire Guide Features
items: Wire guide through a small wire guide tube
Wire guide using pulleys that allows working with wire up to 1 mm in diameter.
Its angle is usually 45°.

tensionador-de-hilo-th3-d.title: TH3 D Wire Tensioner
tensionador-de-hilo-th3-d.heroSubtitle: Magnetic brake wire tensioner for wire diameters from 0.50 mm to 3.00 mm.
tensionador-de-hilo-th3-d.excerpt: Magnetic brake wire tensioner for wire diameters from 0.50 mm to 3.00 mm.

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN TH3 D features
brandFeatures.body: Wire tension is adjusted by the magnetic brake, which provides constant tension throughout the winding process. Wire enters the tensioner through a ceramic eyelet and an inlet pulley. This inlet design allows wire spools mounted on creels or dereelers to be used, because the ceramic eyelet is mounted on a pivoting piece that adapts to the natural wire path as it leaves the spool. In this version, the tensioner is mounted directly on the winding machine. Brake adjustment is performed via potentiometer or display screen.

items.title: Wire break detector
items.description: Detector that stops the machine in the event of wire breakage.

items.title: Encoder
items.description: System that counts the revolutions of the main pulley. Allows wire consumption to be tracked.

tensionador-de-hilo-th3-d.tagline: The key to winding lies in applying the correct tension and wire guidance

bobinadora-e600-long.title: E600 LONG
bobinadora-e600-long.excerpt: E600 winding machine with extended winding zone for special applications requiring greater working length.
bobinadora-e600-long.content:
Special ERASAN E600 winding machine configuration with extended bed for projects requiring a larger winding zone.

Ideal for custom windings in transformers and demanding industrial applications.
features: Extended winding zone compared to the standard E600 model
Same ERASAN technology base with precision guidance
Special project adaptable to customer requirements

maquina-flyer.title: Flyer Machine
maquina-flyer.excerpt: Flyer winding machine for special winding applications with rotating conductor movement.
maquina-flyer.content:
ERASAN solution for flyer windings, used in applications requiring specific guidance and tension during the winding process.

Developed as a special project according to the customer's production needs.
features: Designed for flyer windings and special applications
Precise conductor control during winding
Custom manufacturing according to project specifications

encintadora.title: Taping Machine
encintadora.excerpt: Taping machine for applying insulating tape to coils with precise tension and guidance control.
encintadora.content:
Specialized equipment for the taping process on electrical coils, integrating constant tension and precise guidance of insulating material.

Custom solution for production lines requiring automated coil finishing.
features: Uniform application of insulating tape
Tension control during taping
Configuration adaptable to coil type and material

bobifil.title: Bobifil
bobifil.heroSubtitle: Bobifil winding machines – back to life
bobifil.excerpt: Bobifil winding machines – back to life. Complete retrofit to return equipment of any condition to production.
heroIntro: For manufacturing electrical coils used in solenoids, reactors, inductors, and power and distribution transformers.

highlight.title: Complete retrofit: back to life
highlight.subtitle: We renew Bobifil winding machines with modernized kinematics, servomotors in winding head and wire guide, and updated control to maximize equipment lifespan.

benefitCards.title: Up to 500 rpm with high torque
benefitCards.description: Two kinematic versions to adapt to each winding need in terms of torque and speed

benefitCards.title: Coils up to 800 mm
benefitCards.description: Allows manufacturing high and low voltage coils on the same machine

benefitCards.title: Servomotors in head and wire guide
benefitCards.description: Precision and control throughout the winding process

benefitCards.title: Two speed ranges
benefitCards.description: Manual belt change or direct reducer on the machine shaft

brandFeatures.title: Features RETROFIT BOBIFIL
items: Two kinematic versions: up to 500 rpm with high torque
Allows manufacturing coils up to 800 mm in length
Allows manufacturing high and low voltage coils on the same machine
Equipped with servomotors in winding head and wire guide
Two speed ranges with manual belt change, or direct reducer on the machine shaft
Allows easy adaptation to winding needs in terms of torque and speed

kits-retrofit.title: Retrofit Kit
kits-retrofit.excerpt: Fully wired and tested cabinet ready to install on virtually any winding machine on the market.
kits-retrofit.content:
We offer a fully wired and tested cabinet to install on virtually any winding machine on the market.

Return your machine to production equipped with the latest ERASAN control technology.
features: Wired and tested cabinet, ready to install
Compatible with most winding machines on the market
Returns the machine to production with modern control

brandFeatures.title: ERASAN Features KIT RETROFIT
items: Fully wired and tested cabinet
Installable on virtually any winding machine on the market
Returns the machine to production equipped with latest-generation electronics and motors
The cabinet includes a router for remote assistance, so it can be supported throughout its new service life
